name: @getfamiliar/familiar
description: Familiar root workspace — your personal AI assistant. Loyal. Local. Markdown. The actual code lives in shared/, host/, container/, and plugins/<name>/. The host-side bastion (LLM proxy + MCP gateway) lives under host/src/bastion/.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @getfamiliar/shared && npm run build -w @getfamiliar/plugin-transcribe-whisper && npm run build -w @getfamiliar/plugin-cli-chat -w @getfamiliar/plugin-featherless -w @getfamiliar/plugin-memory -w @getfamiliar/plugin-ms365 -w @getfamiliar/plugin-whatsapp -w @getfamiliar/plugin-telegram && npm run build -w @getfamiliar/host && npm run build -w @getfamiliar/container
